Perkins ·Engine

Perkins DJ51434

Spare parts for the Perkins DJ51434 – piston kit, bearings, valve gear, filters, fuel system, and water pump.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
4115P011PISTON KIT & RINGS
UPRK0003PISTON RING
U5MB0037MAIN BEARINGS
U5ME0033CONROD BIG END BEARING

31137561THRUST WASHER

3142W004VALVE COLLET

2641A203LIFT PUMP
